en.title: FUD FAQ | A Weekly Community Thread | Week 62

blocks.value: FUD FAQ | A Weekly Community Thread | Week 62
Top Question of the Week

When the fear, uncertainty, and doubt index starts to spike once again a fair question rises to the top of many minds: Is the market we’re in, or the global economy in its entirety, a game of chance or a game of skill?
Well, that depends. Which economy?
Web3, when you really get it, is a game of skill. Same is true with CC0.
A game is no more & no less than a loop of steps that repeat, with or without a limit, giving us a model to practice & explore any kind of activity
Machines are games. Software programs are games. Video games are obviously games.
The creative economy is also a game, with base rules that change a lot thanks to CC0…
When the quality of the work you do matters more to the outcome of a game than however much it involves elements of chance, that’s when it’s useful to describe that game as skills based
Web3, NFTs & CC0 give creators new ways to monetize our skills through content, instead of locking down & limiting the reach of content itself…
Most Common Repeat Question
How do you survive an everythingmarket crash?
You don’t. Cause we aren’t in one.
It’s a crunch, not a crash.
We’re now in the advanced early stages of an everything omnicrunch. What better time than now to recogmize the real reasons why?
On top of the obvious shortfalls in supply unable to keep up with structurally accelerating demand, there’s an underlying global reorganization of what gets made, how well, for how much, and where.
How to make it in an everything crunch, using web3, NFTs, and CC0 will remain the question of the day for many years to come.
Top Controversies

Turns out, a pretty loud handful of the open source and web2 tech community alongside leading authors and advocates who share their views were never really in favour of open networks or against closed societies and arbitrary bans of critical reasoning skills. They are just a different flavour of the same bullshit league of pseudo totalitarian teams.
This week’s top controversy is just a deeply disappointing joke.
Silly Fails and Trolling

Bans like these show you don’t know enough to hold office. They are a radical abuse of power and do far more to harm global climate and the socioeconomic wellbeing of constituents. Math is the best source of solutions we have. Stop trying to ban it.
View all FUD FAQ here.
If you would like a question answered or contribute content to next weeks article please reach out through our DIGITALAX Discord server in #FUD-FAQ channel!
Join our Community!

ar.title: FUD FAQ | ثريد مجتمعي اسبوعي | اسبوع 62

blocks.value: FUD FAQ | ثريد مجتمعي اسبوعي | اسبوع 62
Top سؤال من ال اسبوع

When ال fear, uncertainty, و doubt index starts الى spike once again a fair سؤال rises الى ال top من many minds: Is ال market we’re في, or ال global economy في its entirety, a game من chance or a game من skill?
ده بيعتمد. اقتصاد مين؟
Web3, when you really get it, is a game من skill. Same is true مع CC0.
A game is no more & no less than a loop من steps that repeat, مع or without a limit, giving us a model الى practice & explore any kind من activity
الماكينات ألعاب. البرامج ألعاب. وأكيد ألعاب الفيديو ألعاب.
ال ابداعي economy is also a game, مع base rules that change a lot thanks الى CC0…
When ال quality من ال work you do matters more الى ال outcome من a game than however much it involves elements من chance, that’s when it’s useful الى describe that game as skills based
Web3, NFTs & CC0 give creators جديد ways الى monetize our skills through content, instead من locking down & limiting ال reach من content itself…
Most Common Repeat سؤال
ازاي do you survive an everythingmarket crash?
You don’t. Cause we aren’t في one.
دي ضغطه، مش انهيار.
We’re now في ال advanced early stages من an everything omnicrunch. What better time than now الى recogmize ال real reasons ليه?
على top من ال obvious shortfalls في supply unable الى keep up مع structurally accelerating demand, there’s an underlying global reorganization من what gets made, ازاي well, لـ ازاي much, و where.
ازاي الى make it في an everything crunch, using web3, NFTs, و CC0 will remain ال سؤال من ال day لـ many years الى come.
أهم الجدل في المجال

Turns out, a pretty loud handful من ال open source و web2 tech المجتمع alongside leading authors و advocates who share their views were never really في favour من open networks or against closed societies و arbitrary bans من critical reasoning skills. They are just a different flavour من ال same bullshit league من pseudo totalitarian teams.
This اسبوع’s top controversy is just a deeply disappointing joke.
Silly Fails و Trolling

Bans like these show you don’t know enough الى hold office. They are a radical abuse من power و do far more الى harm global climate و ال socioeconomic wellbeing من constituents. Math is ال best source من solutions we have. Stop trying الى ban it.
